## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the manual testing you did. -->

- [ ] Switching Default ⇄ Freeze in the popup takes effect live
- [ ] Leaving and returning to Home preserves the feed + scroll position
- [ ] A full reload on Home keeps the frozen feed
- [ ] "Refresh feed" loads a fresh feed

## Checklist

- [ ] Any new YouTube selectors live in `src/content/selectors.js` (not hardcoded elsewhere)
- [ ] No important state kept only in the service worker
- [ ] I tested in at least one Chromium browser and noted the version
- [ ] Commits use clear, imperative-mood messages
